description: Square text-only graphic from the U.S. Department of Labor. The background is deep navy blue with a large faint watermark-style rendering of the DOL seal filling the canvas (the words 'DEPARTMENT OF LABOR' and 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA' are faintly legible around the circular seal). A small crisp DOL seal sits centered at the top. The body text is in bold white serif type in two paragraphs: 'The Trump Administration is fully committed to reopening the government for the American People.' and 'At the Department of Labor, we will continue doing as much as we can to put American Workers First during the Democrat Shutdown.' There are no photos or illustrations.
notable_text: The Trump Administration is fully committed to reopening the government for the American People. At the Department of Labor, we will continue doing as much as we can to put American Workers First during the Democrat Shutdown.
